mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM book WHERE status = 1) AS bookTotal, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reader WHERE status = 1) AS readerTotal, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_record WHERE status = 'BORROWED') AS borrowedTotal, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_record WHERE status = 'BORROWED' AND due_date < CURDATE()) AS overdueTotal, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_record WHERE DATE(borrow_date) = CURDATE()) AS todayBorrowTotal, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM seat_reservation WHERE status = 1 AND reservation_date = CURDATE()) AS todaySeatTotal

SELECT c.id AS id, c.category_name AS categoryName, COUNT(b.id) AS bookCount FROM book_category c LEFT JOIN book b ON b.category_id = c.id AND b.status = 1 WHERE c.status = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name ORDER BY bookCount DESC, c.id ASC
SELECT id AS id, title AS title, content AS content, status AS status, create_time AS createTime FROM notice WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT b.id AS id, b.book_no AS bookNo, b.book_name AS bookName, b.author AS author, b.publisher AS publisher, b.cover_image AS coverImage, b.available_count AS availableCount, b.borrow_count AS borrowCount, c.category_name AS categoryName FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.status = 1 AND (b.recommend_flag = 1 OR b.borrow_count >= 0) ORDER BY b.recommend_flag DESC, b.borrow_count DESC, b.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT br.id AS id, r.name AS readerName, r.reader_no AS readerNo, b.book_name AS bookName, br.borrow_date AS borrowDate, br.due_date AS dueDate, br.status AS status FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN reader r ON br.reader_id = r.id LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT br.id AS id, r.name AS readerName, r.reader_no AS readerNo, b.book_name AS bookName, br.due_date AS dueDate, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), br.due_date) AS overdueDays, br.fine AS fine FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN reader r ON br.reader_id = r.id LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.status = 'BORROWED' AND br.due_date < CURDATE() ORDER BY br.due_date ASC

SELECT c.id AS id, c.category_name AS categoryName, c.description AS description, c.status AS status, c.create_time AS createTime, COUNT(b.id) AS bookCount FROM book_category c LEFT JOIN book b ON b.category_id = c.id AND b.status = 1
c.category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name, c.description, c.status, c.create_time ORDER BY c.status DESC, c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_category(category_name, description, status, create_time) VALUES(#{categoryName}, #{description}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE book_category SET category_name = #{categoryName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE book_category SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT n.id AS id, n.title AS title, n.content AS content, n.status AS status, n.create_time AS createTime, n.update_time AS updateTime, a.real_name AS publisherName FROM notice n LEFT JOIN admin a ON n.publisher_id = a.id
n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY n.status DESC, n.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice(title, content, publisher_id, status, create_time) VALUES(#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO renew_request(borrow_record_id, reader_id, reason, status, apply_time) SELECT #{borrowRecordId}, #{readerId}, #{reason}, 'PENDING', NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM renew_request WHERE borrow_record_id = #{borrowRecordId} AND status = 'PENDING' )
mapper.update: UPDATE renew_request SET status = 'APPROVED', handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, remark = #{remark}, handle_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE renew_request SET status = 'REJECTED', handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, remark = #{remark}, handle_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT fr.id AS id, fr.borrow_record_id AS borrowRecordId, r.reader_no AS readerNo, r.name AS readerName, b.book_name AS bookName, fr.amount AS amount, fr.status AS status, fr.pay_time AS payTime, fr.create_time AS createTime, br.due_date AS dueDate FROM fine_record fr LEFT JOIN borrow_record br ON fr.borrow_record_id = br.id LEFT JOIN reader r ON fr.reader_id = r.id LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id
fr.status = #{status}
AND (r.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.reader_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.book_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY fr.status ASC, fr.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fine_record(borrow_record_id, reader_id, amount, status, create_time) SELECT br.id, br.reader_id, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), br.due_date) * 0.50, 'UNPAID', NOW() FROM borrow_record br WHERE br.status = 'BORROWED' AND br.due_date < CURDATE() AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fine_record fr WHERE fr.borrow_record_id = br.id)
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record SET fine_status = 'PAID', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{borrowRecordId}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, floor_no AS floorNo, floor_name AS floorName, status AS status FROM library_floor WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY floor_no ASC
SELECT id AS id, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, status AS status FROM seat_time_slot WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY start_time ASC

SELECT s.id AS id, s.floor_id AS floorId, s.seat_no AS seatNo, s.row_no AS rowNo, s.col_no AS colNo, CASE WHEN sr.id IS NOT NULL AND sr.reader_id = #{readerId} THEN 'MINE' WHEN sr.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'RESERVED' WHEN sl.id IS NOT NULL AND sl.reader_id = #{readerId} THEN 'LOCKED_MINE' WHEN sl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOCKED' ELSE 'FREE' END AS seatStatus, sr.id AS reservationId FROM library_seat s LEFT JOIN seat_reservation sr ON sr.seat_id = s.id AND sr.reservation_date = #{reservationDate} AND sr.time_slot_id = #{timeSlotId} AND sr.status = 1 LEFT JOIN seat_lock sl ON sl.seat_id = s.id AND sl.reservation_date = #{reservationDate} AND sl.time_slot_id = #{timeSlotId} AND sl.status = 1 AND sl.expire_time > NOW() WHERE s.status = 1 AND (#{floorId} IS NULL OR s.floor_id = #{floorId}) ORDER BY s.floor_id ASC, s.row_no ASC, s.col_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE seat_lock SET status = 0 WHERE status = 1 AND expire_time <= NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM seat_reservation WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND reservation_date = #{reservationDate} AND time_slot_id = #{timeSlotId} AND status = 1) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM seat_lock WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND reservation_date = #{reservationDate} AND time_slot_id = #{timeSlotId} AND status = 1 AND expire_time > NOW())
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seat_lock(seat_id, reader_id, reservation_date, time_slot_id, expire_time, status, create_time) VALUES(#{seatId}, #{readerId}, #{reservationDate}, #{timeSlotId}, #{expireTime}, 1, NOW())
INSERT INTO seat_reservation(seat_id, reader_id, reservation_date, time_slot_id, status, create_time) VALUES(#{seatId}, #{readerId}, #{reservationDate}, #{timeSlotId}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE seat_reservation SET status = 0, cancel_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE seat_reservation SET status = 0, cancel_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND reader_id = #{readerId}
mapper.select:
SELECT sr.id AS id, lf.floor_name AS floorName, ls.seat_no AS seatNo, r.reader_no AS readerNo, r.name AS readerName, sr.reservation_date AS reservationDate, sts.start_time AS startTime, sts.end_time AS endTime, sr.status AS status, sr.create_time AS createTime FROM seat_reservation sr LEFT JOIN library_seat ls ON sr.seat_id = ls.id LEFT JOIN library_floor lf ON ls.floor_id = lf.id LEFT JOIN seat_time_slot sts ON sr.time_slot_id = sts.id LEFT JOIN reader r ON sr.reader_id = r.id
sr.status = 1 AND sr.reservation_date = #{reservationDate} AND ls.floor_id = #{floorId}
AND (r.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.reader_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ls.seat_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY sr.reservation_date DESC, sts.start_time ASC, ls.seat_no ASC

SELECT sr.id AS id, lf.floor_name AS floorName, ls.seat_no AS seatNo, sr.reservation_date AS reservationDate, sts.start_time AS startTime, sts.end_time AS endTime, sr.status AS status FROM seat_reservation sr LEFT JOIN library_seat ls ON sr.seat_id = ls.id LEFT JOIN library_floor lf ON ls.floor_id = lf.id LEFT JOIN seat_time_slot sts ON sr.time_slot_id = sts.id WHERE sr.reader_id = #{readerId} AND sr.status = 1 AND CONCAT(sr.reservation_date, ' ', sts.end_time) >= NOW() ORDER BY sr.reservation_date ASC, sts.start_time ASC

SELECT b.id AS id, b.book_no AS bookNo, b.book_name AS bookName, b.author AS author, b.publisher AS publisher, b.isbn AS isbn, b.cover_image AS coverImage, b.description AS description, b.total_count AS totalCount, b.available_count AS availableCount, b.borrow_count AS borrowCount, b.recommend_flag AS recommendFlag, c.category_name AS categoryName FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id
b.status = 1
AND (b.book_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.book_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.category_id = #{categoryId} AND b.recommend_flag = 1
ORDER BY b.recommend_flag DESC, b.borrow_count DESC, b.id DESC

SELECT b.id AS id, b.book_no AS bookNo, b.book_name AS bookName, b.author AS author, b.publisher AS publisher, b.isbn AS isbn, b.cover_image AS coverImage, b.description AS description, b.total_count AS totalCount, b.available_count AS availableCount, b.borrow_count AS borrowCount, b.recommend_flag AS recommendFlag, c.category_name AS categoryName FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id}

SELECT br.id AS id, b.book_name AS bookName, b.book_no AS bookNo, b.cover_image AS coverImage, br.borrow_date AS borrowDate, br.due_date AS dueDate, br.return_date AS returnDate, br.status AS status, br.renew_count AS renewCount, br.fine AS fine, br.fine_status AS fineStatus, CASE WHEN br.status = 'BORROWED' AND br.due_date < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS overdueFlag FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.reader_id = #{readerId}
AND br.status = 'RETURNED'
AND br.status = 'BORROWED'
ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC
SELECT * FROM borrow_record WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} ORDER BY borrow_date DESC

SELECT id AS id, reader_no AS readerNo, username AS username, student_no AS studentNo, name AS name, gender AS gender, college AS college, major AS major, class_name AS className, department AS department, phone AS phone, email AS email, avatar AS avatar, create_time AS createTime FROM reader WHERE id = #{readerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reader SET phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = CASE WHEN #{avatar} IS NULL OR #{avatar} = '' THEN avatar ELSE #{avatar} END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{readerId}
mapper.select:
SELECT id AS id, username AS username, real_name AS realName, role AS role, phone AS phone, email AS email, status AS status, create_time AS createTime FROM admin
username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR role LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY status DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin(username, password, real_name, role, phone, email, status, create_time) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{email}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE admin SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id AS id, operator_type AS operatorType, operator_id AS operatorId, operator_name AS operatorName, module AS module, operation AS operation, request_url AS requestUrl, ip AS ip, create_time AS createTime FROM operation_log
module = #{module}
AND (operator_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR operation LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR module LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 200
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log(operator_type, operator_id, operator_name, module, operation, request_url, ip, create_time) VALUES(#{operatorType}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{module}, #{operation}, #{requestUrl}, #{ip}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT b.book_no AS bookNo, b.book_name AS bookName, b.author AS author, b.publisher AS publisher, c.category_name AS categoryName, b.total_count AS totalCount, b.available_count AS availableCount, b.status AS status FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id ORDER BY b.id DESC

SELECT br.id AS id, r.reader_no AS readerNo, r.name AS readerName, b.book_no AS bookNo, b.book_name AS bookName, br.borrow_date AS borrowDate, br.due_date AS dueDate, br.return_date AS returnDate, br.status AS status, br.fine AS fine FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN reader r ON br.reader_id = r.id LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id ORDER BY br.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book(book_no, book_name, author, publisher, category_id, total_count, available_count, status, create_time) VALUES(#{bookNo}, #{bookName}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{categoryId}, #{totalCount}, #{availableCount}, 1, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE book_name = VALUES(book_name), author = VALUES(author), publisher = VALUES(publisher), category_id = VALUES(category_id), total_count = VALUES(total_count), available_count = VALUES(available_count), update_time = NOW()
